overall.description: Aerial drone footage sweeping across a futuristic coastal city at sunset, revealing cyberpunk architecture including a distinctive pyramid building and dense construction zones. The camera smoothly pans from a beachfront area through a commercial district with neon signage into a canyon of towering skyscrapers under heavy construction. The footage exhibits high-quality game engine rendering with cinematic golden hour lighting characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beachfront with modern resort architecture

agents.ego_description: smooth aerial drone sweep across the waterfront approaching the city

entered.detail: calm ocean water with gentle waves lapping at the shore
sandy beach area with scattered debris and rocks
modern terraced buildings with glass facades along the shoreline
distinctive stepped pyramid-shaped skyscraper with geometric terraces
tall futuristic towers visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a sweeping aerial view of a futuristic coastal city at golden hour. The camera glides over calm waters and a sandy beach toward a distinctive pyramid-shaped building, with modern resort complexes lining the left shore. The wide-open waterfront scene is bathed in warm sunset light with clear visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial plaza with neon signage and highway interchange

events.description: camera reveals the Los Osos commercial district with prominent neon signage and highway overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing aerial sweep over the commercial district focusing on architectural details

entered.detail: large illuminated neon sign reading 'LOS OSOS' in teal lettering
elevated highway interchange with moving traffic below
multiple yellow construction cranes visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The drone moves into a commercial zone where the prominent 'Los Osos' neon sign marks a highway interchange. The pyramid building shifts to the right as the camera pans, revealing construction cranes and dense urban development. The beach and water disappear from view, replaced by asphalt roads and palm-lined commercial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown construction canyon with mega-skyscrapers

events.description: strong lens flare from setting sun as camera faces between towering buildings

agents.ego_description: flying deeper into the urban canyon between towering construction sites

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with industrial scaffolding and construction equipment
bright golden lens flare from the setting sun between buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a dense urban canyon dominated by massive skyscrapers under heavy construction. The setting sun creates a dramatic lens flare as the camera navigates between towering structures covered in scaffolding and cranes. The Los Osos sign and pyramid building exit the frame, replaced by an industrial cityscape of steel and glass rising into the golden sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial sweep that transforms from a serene coastal waterfront into a dense, industrial urban canyon. It begins gliding over calm waters and a sandy beach toward a distinctive pyramid-shaped building, with modern resort complexes lining the shore under a warm sunset. As the camera moves inland, the open waterfront gives way to a commercial zone where the pyramid shifts to the right and the Los Osos neon sign marks a highway interchange amidst palm-lined structures. The scene then shifts further into the city, leaving the beach and signage behind to enter a narrow corridor of massive skyscrapers under heavy construction. Finally, the camera navigates between towering steel structures and scaffolding, with the setting sun creating a dramatic lens flare against the golden sky.
